source.name: Mac OS 8.1 retail CD image from Internet Archive

note: Icons were extracted from the Mac OS 8.1 HFS CD image resource forks with hfsutils MacBinary export plus rsrcdump conversion. Coverage includes System, Finder, Appearance Extension, bundled utilities, applications, CD Extras, Internet Extras, control panels, and extensions when parseable.
